businessName: FIX MY ROOF Total Roof Restorations
summary: FIX MY ROOF Total Roof Restorations has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: contact page is not easy to verify.
outreachHook: I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: No contact/enquiry/quote page candidate was captured from visible links.
openDesignDirection: FIX MY ROOF Total Roof Restorations should feel like the obvious roofing choice in Brisbane. Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes. Preserve or create a clear contact/quote page and link it from header, footer, and CTA blocks. Rewrite title around "Roofing contractor Brisbane" while keeping the business name.

captured.title: FIX MY ROOF TOTAL ROOF RESTORATIONS | Billdu
headings: FIX MY ROOF TOTAL ROOF RESTORATIONS
captured.primaryCta: 🗓 Available for online quotes & bookings as well.

signals.primaryCta: 🗓 Available for online quotes & bookings as well.

findings.title: Core services are not instantly clear
findings.evidence: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Roofing contractor, Tile contractor.
findings.impact: A lead may not recognize that the business solves their specific problem.
findings.fix: Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes.

findings.title: Page is hard to scan
findings.evidence: Only 1 readable heading(s) were captured.
findings.impact: Skimming visitors have fewer anchors for services, proof, service area, and CTA.
findings.fix: Add clear section headings for services, proof, service area, and final CTA.

findings.title: Visual proof is under-explained
findings.evidence: Few captured images include descriptive alt text or proof context.
findings.impact: Before/after, team, and job-site proof may not transfer trust quickly.
findings.fix: Use before/after or job-site proof with descriptive captions and useful alt text.

findings.title: Contact page is not easy to verify
findings.evidence: No contact/enquiry/quote page candidate was captured from visible links.
findings.impact: A redesign needs a clear, trackable conversion endpoint.
findings.fix: Preserve or create a clear contact/quote page and link it from header, footer, and CTA blocks.

findings.title: Social proof channels are missing
findings.evidence: No visible Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, X, or WhatsApp link was captured.
findings.impact: Visual or review-heavy businesses lose an easy trust path.
findings.fix: Add verified social links or replace with stronger on-page testimonials/gallery proof.

findings.title: Basic trust/legal links are thin
findings.evidence: Privacy or terms links were not captured from visible page links.
findings.impact: This is a minor trust and SEO hygiene gap, especially when forms collect customer data.
findings.fix: Add privacy and terms links in the footer when forms or tracking are used.

checks.title: FIX MY ROOF TOTAL ROOF RESTORATIONS | Billdu
checks.metaDescription:
DINO from FIX MY ROOF TOTAL ROOF RESTORATIONS specialises in roof restorations on
 single-story concrete tile roofs in North Brisbane Qld which involves pressure washing the roof, repointing of ridgecapping, replacement of broken roof tiles, applying a PRIMER coat & applying 2 coats of INDUSTRIAL ROOF COATINGS membrane.
This comprehensive approach ensures a long-lasting & aesthetically pleasing result for his clients.
Dino prioritizes customer satisfaction and boasts many positive 5 star reviews
h1s: FIX MY ROOF TOTAL ROOF RESTORATIONS

findings.title: Title does not target the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured title: "FIX MY ROOF TOTAL ROOF RESTORATIONS | Billdu". Inferred keyword: "Roofing contractor Brisbane".
findings.impact: The page may rank or click worse for the service/location query we care about.
findings.fix: Rewrite title around "Roofing contractor Brisbane" while keeping the business name.

findings.title: Meta description is too generic for the lead angle
findings.evidence: Captured meta description does not clearly include "Roofing contractor Brisbane" or a close variant.
findings.impact: The search snippet may not match high-intent local searches.
findings.fix: Mention service, location, and a concrete result or quote action.

findings.title: H1 misses the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured H1: "FIX MY ROOF TOTAL ROOF RESTORATIONS". Inferred keyword: "Roofing contractor Brisbane".
findings.impact: Visitors and search engines may not see the core service immediately.
findings.fix: Make the H1 naturally cover "Roofing contractor Brisbane" or a close variant.

findings.title: Page content is thin
findings.evidence: 156 words captured.
findings.impact: Thin pages have fewer chances to explain services, locations, and trust.
findings.fix: Add concise service, proof, area, and FAQ copy without stuffing.

findings.title: Internal linking is weak
findings.evidence: 1 internal link(s) captured.
findings.impact: Important pages may be harder to discover and preserve during redesign.
findings.fix: Link to services, contact/quote, about/proof, and relevant location pages.

findings.title: Structured data is missing
findings.evidence: No JSON-LD schema types were captured.
findings.impact: LocalBusiness schema can make core business facts clearer to search engines.
findings.fix: Add LocalBusiness/Organization schema with verified name, phone, area, URL, and social links.
